nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process

nodes.label: AI as practical support tool

nodes.label: AI as threat to artistic endeavors
nodes.label_negative: AI as harmless tool that enhances creativity

nodes.label: Authorial control and creative ownership
nodes.grounding_span: I was the driving creative force, and the AI model was just the icing on the cake

nodes.label: Creative expansion and inspiration
nodes.grounding_span: my creative playing field has been substantially increased

nodes.label: Workflow efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: it made the project run so much smoother

nodes.label: Preservation of human artistic value
nodes.grounding_span: true human expression will be outplayed by limitless AI ability

nodes.label: Ethical responsibility
nodes.grounding_span: if I hear word from the artist community that we need to make an effort to stop AI use, I'll happily comply
